previous_stale_token_result.message: User was not authorized to access anthropic-primary/claude-opus-4-8 or model did not exist for that credential scope.

root_cause: A stale inherited TFY_API_KEY overrode the rotated project .env token; python-dotenv was also absent and that failure was silently ignored.
client_fix: Project .env values now take precedence over inherited process values, and a missing python-dotenv fails closed when .env exists.
